title: Amtech S1725 Soldering Iron, 60 Watt 230-240V, Insulated Handle and Metal Stand, 350~400°C High Temperature Range
features: VERSATILE: This 60W soldering iron is ideal for medium duty tasks such as circuit boards and thin cables, but can also be used on more delicate components like jewellery, watches and mobile devices
LONG REACH: It has a 105cm lead and a long reach, fine pencil tip for good access
QUICK HEATING: It heats up in minutes to a temperature of 350°-400°C
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Soldering iron See more
